title: ExtensionContext from @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent does not expose currentModel / currentProvider — DEC-0001's enacted resolution mechanism has no canonical source
description: DEC-0001 (enacted 2026-05-26 commit bb45880) declares: 'Bare model ids in an agent spec resolve against the current session's configured provider via ExtensionContext.' Plan-mode exploration of pi-jit-agents internals (TASK-081 planning, 2026-05-26) empirically verified that pi-coding-agent's ExtensionContext does NOT expose currentModel or currentProvider fields. Grep across node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/ returns zero hits for 'currentModel' or 'currentProvider' as ExtensionContext fields. Model is currently passed directly as a pre-resolved Model<Api> instance in jit-agents' DispatchContext (types.ts:194), constructed by the caller from auth.json + parseModelSpec. The canonical-source DEC-0001 assumed does not exist where canon thought it did. Three resolution paths: (a) extend pi-coding-agent's ExtensionContext to expose currentModel/currentProvider — upstream dependency change; (b) sourceful resolution from auth.json + env at jit-agents level (no ExtensionContext dependency); (c) re-anchor DEC-0001 to reflect actual resolution source (Model<Api> already pre-resolved in DispatchContext; the 'bare model id' problem disappears because resolution happens BEFORE executeAgent receives the dispatch).

evidence.reference: Grep for currentModel / currentProvider as ExtensionContext fields returns zero hits (verified 2026-05-26 during TASK-081 plan-mode exploration)
DEC-0001 (enacted bb45880) decision body cites ExtensionContext as the canonical resolution source

DispatchContext (lines 193-230) carries pre-resolved Model<Api> directly; no spec-string-resolution path exists in jit-agents today; the resolution-via-ExtensionContext path DEC-0001 enacted has no implementation surface
Line 1173+1390: parseModelSpec + Model<Api> construction currently happens in the caller (monitors), defaulting to 'anthropic' — the bug DEC-0001 was filed to address

impact: Blocks DEC-0001 implementation (TASK-085). The enacted decision body cannot be implemented as written — no ExtensionContext path to current-session model exists. Either pi-coding-agent extends, or jit-agents sources differently, or DEC-0001 re-anchors. Until resolved, the original bug (monitor classify defaulting to anthropic provider regardless of session) remains in code; agents using bare model ids continue to mis-route under non-anthropic auth configurations.
